description: Printing the full environment or .env contents for debugging, exposing secrets in logs or transcripts.
body: Failure mode: a debugging step dumps all environment variables or cats the .env file, writing API keys, tokens, and passwords into logs, terminal scrollback, or a shared transcript. Detection signals: env/printenv output containing credential-looking keys; secret values visible in captured output; .env contents echoed. Do not print secret values to inspect config. Safer fallback: reference variables by key name, redact values, and inspect only the specific non-secret keys needed; confirm presence with a boolean check rather than echoing the value.
